title: AKM Configuration
description: Configuration file for the akm CLI (Agent Kit Manager). Stored at ~/.config/akm/config.json (Linux/macOS) or %APPDATA%\akm\config.json (Windows). Supports JSONC (JavaScript-style comments). The 0.8.0 shape uses profiles, defaults, and per-section process configs.

configVersion.description: Schema version marker. "0.8.0" = current shape (profiles/defaults). Configs without this field are auto-migrated to the current shape at load time.

profiles.description: v2: Named connection profiles. profiles.llm holds OpenAI-compatible LLM connections; profiles.agent holds CLI and in-process agent profiles; profiles.improve holds improve pipeline profiles.

llm.description: Named LLM connection profiles. Each key is a profile name; value is an LlmProfileConfig.

agent.description: Named agent profiles. Each key is a profile name; value is an AgentProfileConfigV2.

improve.description: Named improve pipeline profiles. Each key is a profile name; value is an ImproveProfileConfig. Built-in profiles: default, quick, thorough, memory-focus.

defaults.description: v2: Default profile names and improve pipeline defaults.

llm.description: Name of the default LLM profile from profiles.llm.

agent.description: Name of the default agent profile from profiles.agent.

improve.description: Name of the default improve profile from profiles.improve. Built-in options: default, quick, thorough, memory-focus.

stashDir.description: Path to the working stash directory.

semanticSearchMode.description: Semantic vector search mode. "auto" enables embedding generation and hybrid FTS5 + vector search. "off" disables embeddings and uses text-only search.

registries.description: Configured registries for kit discovery. When absent, built-in defaults are used (official registry + skills.sh). An explicit empty array disables all registries.

stashes.description: Additional stash sources (filesystem paths and remote providers).

sources.description: Canonical key for additional sources (filesystem paths and remote providers).

defaultWriteTarget.description: Default destination for `akm remember` / `akm import` and any other write helper that does not receive an explicit `--target`.

installed.description: Installed kit metadata. Managed automatically by akm install/uninstall commands — do not edit manually.

index.description: Per-pass indexer configuration. Reserved keys: `metadataEnhance` and `stalenessDetection` gate the corresponding passes. Other keys are pass names whose values are IndexPassConfig.

metadataEnhance.description: Gates the `akm index` metadata-enhancement pass. Replaces the legacy `features.index.metadata_enhance` flag. Default: enabled.

stalenessDetection.description: Gates the `akm index` staleness-detection pass. Default: disabled.

security.description: Security controls for install-time auditing and registry allowlists.

stashInheritance.description: Controls how a config layer's stashes interact with stashes inherited from earlier layers.

writable.description: When true, the primary stash is treated as a writable git repo and `akm save` will push after committing.

minScore.description: Minimum score floor for semantic-only hits. Hits below this score are dropped.

graphBoost.description: Graph boost tuning for search-time ranking.

directBoostPerEntity.description: Additive direct-match boost per matched entity.

directBoostCap.description: Maximum direct-match additive boost per hit.

hopBoostPerEntity.description: Additive connected-entity boost per matched graph entity.

hopBoostCap.description: Maximum connected-entity additive boost per hit.

maxHops.description: Maximum graph traversal depth from query-matched entities.

confidenceMode.description: Confidence integration mode for graph boost scoring.

confidenceWeight.description: Blend strength in [0,1] when confidenceMode is "blend".

curateRerank.description: Gates the `akm curate` LLM-rerank pass. Replaces the legacy `features.search.curate_rerank` flag. Default: disabled.

requireReason.description: When true, negative feedback without --reason throws a hard error.

utilityDecay.description: Phase 2A / Rec 5: configurable forgetting curve for the utility-recency boost used during search ranking. Default-safe: omitting this object preserves the legacy exp(-days/30) decay.

halfLifeDays.description: Recency half-life in days for the utility decay curve. Default: 30 (matches the legacy hardcoded RECENCY_DECAY_DAYS).

feedbackStabilityBoost.description: Multiplicative half-life extension per positive feedback event recorded against the entry. Effective half-life is capped at halfLifeDays * 4. Default: 1.5. Set to 1.0 to disable the boost entirely.

archiveRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain soft-invalidated memory assets in .akm/archive/ before TTL cleanup. Also gates proposal expiration: pending proposals older than this threshold are archived as "expired: no action within retention window" during the improve maintenance pass. Set to 0 to disable both TTL cleanup and proposal expiration.

enabled.description: Whether this process is enabled. Default: true.

mode.description: Dispatch mode: llm = direct HTTP call, agent = CLI subprocess, sdk = in-process opencode.

profile.description: Named runner profile from profiles.llm or profiles.agent.

timeoutMs.description: Per-process timeout in milliseconds. null = unlimited.

allowedTypes.description: Whitelist of asset types for this process. Absent = built-in default applies.

cooldownByType.description: Per-type cooldown overrides in days for this process.

cooldownDays.description: Uniform cooldown in days for types not covered by cooldownByType.

qualityGate.description: LLM-as-judge quality gate. For distill: replaces lesson_quality_gate. For reflect: replaces proposal_quality_gate. Default: disabled.

contradictionDetection.description: Pairwise contradiction-detection on derived memories. Only meaningful on `consolidate`. Default: disabled.

ImproveProfileConfig.description: Named improve pipeline profile. Controls which sub-processes run, which asset types are processed, and default autoAccept/limit values.

autoAccept.description: Default auto-accept confidence threshold (0-100) for this profile. CLI --auto-accept overrides.

limit.description: Default --limit for this profile. CLI --limit overrides.

LlmProfileConfig.description: Named LLM connection profile. Extends LlmConnectionConfig with supportsJsonSchema.

supportsJsonSchema.description: When true, chatCompletion sends response_format: json_schema for structured output. Requires provider support (OpenAI, compatible endpoints).

AgentProfileConfigV2.description: Named agent profile. platform discriminates between CLI subprocess and in-process opencode SDK.

platform.description: Agent runtime: opencode = opencode CLI subprocess, claude = claude CLI subprocess, opencode-sdk = in-process opencode programmatic API.

bin.description: Binary name or path for opencode/claude platforms.

args.description: Extra CLI arguments for opencode/claude platforms.

workspace.description: Workspace directory for opencode-sdk platform. ${PWD} is expanded at runtime.

BaseConnectionConfig.description: Shared fields for OpenAI-compatible connection configurations.

apiKey.description: API key for authenticated endpoints. Prefer environment variables — API keys are stripped from the config file on save.

EmbeddingConnectionConfig.description: OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint configuration. When not set, uses local @huggingface/transformers with Xenova/bge-small-en-v1.5.

dimension.description: Output vector dimension. Must match the index dimension (typically 384).

LlmConnectionConfig.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint configuration for metadata generation. When not set, the indexer uses heuristic metadata generation instead.

concurrency.description: Max parallel LLM requests issued by index passes.

contextLength.description: Model context window size in tokens used for prompt chunk sizing.

judgeModel.description: Optional model override for the LLM-as-judge lesson quality gate.

capabilities.description: Capability flags learned at setup time.

structuredOutput.description: Whether the model reliably emits strict JSON.

extraParams.description: Arbitrary provider-specific parameters forwarded to chat completions.

format.description: Default output format for CLI commands.

detail.description: Default output detail level for CLI commands.

RegistryConfigEntry.description: Configuration for a kit registry used for discovery and installation.

provider.description: Provider type that handles this registry. Built-in providers: "static-index", "skills-sh".

options.description: Arbitrary provider-specific options passed through to the provider.

StashConfigEntry.description: Configuration for an additional source (filesystem or remote).

path.description: Filesystem path. Used when type is "filesystem".

url.description: Remote URL. Used for remote providers ("git", "website").

writable.description: Whether akm may write assets to this source.

primary.description: Marks this entry as the primary working stash (replaces the top-level `stashDir`).

wikiName.description: When set, .md files in this source are indexed as wiki pages under this name.

InstalledKitEntry.description: Metadata for an installed kit. Managed by akm — do not edit manually.

ref.description: Full reference string used to resolve the kit.

stashRoot.description: Filesystem path where the kit assets are installed.

cacheDir.description: Filesystem path to the kit's cache directory.

installedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the kit was installed.

wikiName.description: When set, all .md files in this kit are indexed as wiki pages.

writable.description: Whether the installed kit source is writable.
